verdict: The chart has good rhythmic synchronization but introduces patterns and density spikes that are far too difficult and awkward for an Easy difficulty rating.

issues.problem: An 8th-note transition into a jump (tap D to JUMP LD) is extremely difficult and physically awkward for beginner players.
An 8th-note sequence containing a jump followed immediately by a tap and a hold is far too complex for an Easy chart.
The dense, consecutive chain of holds in the outro is tedious and confusing for the target difficulty level.
